creator: social@brandongrows.me
text:
Hey there. I'm a little confused about what you're asking for with the last part. Are you asking for a patch that doesn't rely on Ren'py at all? If so, let me clarify:

I haven't removed this from Ren'py at all. The current patch submitted there is not dependent on this one. It instead has this library fully patched to the newer FreeBSD supported version so that Ren'py builds.

Do I need to create a Makefile or anything else for this one? It's right now just building using clang and a modified version of how the developer recommended it in the Readme.
